title: Max Dot Product of Two Subsequences
titleCn: 两个子序列的最大点积

testcases.input: nums1 = [2,1,-2,5], nums2 = [3,0,-6] Output: 18 Explanation: Take subsequence [2,-2] from nums1 and subsequence [3,-6] from nums2. Their dot product is (2*3 + (-2)*(-6)) = 18.
testcases.expectedOutput: 18 Explanation: Take subsequence [2,-2] from nums1 and subsequence [3,-6] from nums2. Their dot product is (2*3 + (-2)*(-6)) = 18.

testcases.input: nums1 = [3,-2], nums2 = [2,-6,7] Output: 21 Explanation: Take subsequence [3] from nums1 and subsequence [7] from nums2. Their dot product is (3*7) = 21.
testcases.expectedOutput: 21 Explanation: Take subsequence [3] from nums1 and subsequence [7] from nums2. Their dot product is (3*7) = 21.

testcases.input: nums1 = [-1,-1], nums2 = [1,1] Output: -1 Explanation: Take subsequence [-1] from nums1 and subsequence [1] from nums2. Their dot product is -1.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: Take subsequence [-1] from nums1 and subsequence [1] from nums2. Their dot product is -1.
